creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
I forgot to mention this in the initial PR, but I have been unable to test if 
this port compiles and runs on powerpc, powerpc64, or sparc64.  If someone could 
test those, I would appreciate it.  Otherwise, the port should probably be 
changed so it's only valid for i386 and amd64.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
